scripts.lint: npm run lint:fe && npm run lint:be
scripts.lint:be: npm run lint:be:ruff && npm run lint:be:ty
scripts.lint:be:ruff: cd backend && uv run --group dev ruff check --config pyproject.toml src/ ../contracts/python/
scripts.lint:be:ty: cd backend && uv run --group dev ty check --project src/
scripts.format: npm run format:fe && npm run format:be
scripts.format:be: cd backend && uv run --group dev ruff format src/ ../contracts/python/
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check:fe && npm run format:check:be
scripts.format:check:be: cd backend && uv run --group dev ruff format --check src/ ../contracts/python/
scripts.typecheck: npm run lint:fe && npm run lint:be:ty
